mapper.select: SELECT opid, room_id, is_voting_delegate, account_status FROM c_owner_property WHERE uid = #{uid} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId}
SELECT opid, room_id, is_voting_delegate, account_status FROM c_owner_property WHERE opid = #{opid}

SELECT op.opid, op.room_id, op.is_voting_delegate, op.account_status FROM c_owner_property op WHERE 1 = 1
AND op.tenant_id = #{tenantId}
SELECT opid, uid, tenant_id, building_id, build_area, is_voting_delegate, account_status FROM c_owner_property WHERE opid = #{opid}

SELECT cu.uid AS uid, a.phone AS phone, MIN(op.building_id) AS building_id, MIN(op.room_id) AS room_id, NULL AS real_name FROM t_account a JOIN c_user cu ON cu.account_id = a.account_id JOIN c_owner_property op ON op.uid = cu.uid AND op.tenant_id = #{tenantId} WHERE a.phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{phoneFragment}, '%') GROUP BY cu.uid, a.phone ORDER BY a.phone LIMIT 20

SELECT cu.uid AS uid, a.phone AS phone, MIN(op.building_id) AS building_id, MIN(op.room_id) AS room_id, a.real_name AS real_name FROM t_account a JOIN c_user cu ON cu.account_id = a.account_id JOIN c_owner_property op ON op.uid = cu.uid AND op.tenant_id = #{tenantId} GROUP BY cu.uid, a.phone, a.real_name ORDER BY cu.uid DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT cu.uid) FROM t_account a JOIN c_user cu ON cu.account_id = a.account_id JOIN c_owner_property op ON op.uid = cu.uid
AND op.tenant_id = #{q.tenantId}
